basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) Postdoctoral Fellow (PDF) Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website bits-pilani.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BITS Pilani Postdoctoral Fellow (PDF) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD degree (or thesis submitted) in Mechanical Engineering or allied disciplines, with strong publication record in Refrigeration, Thermal Engineering, Energy Systems, Heat Pumps, Sustainable Cooling Technologies, CFD, Modelling and Simulation, or related fields
qualification.details: PhD degree (or thesis submitted) in Mechanical Engineering or allied disciplines, with strong publication record in Refrigeration, Thermal Engineering, Energy Systems, Heat Pumps, Sustainable Cooling Technologies, CFD, Modelling and Simulation, or related fields.

salary_details.details: Rs. 70,000/- + Rs. 10,000/- per month as research consumables/contingency allowance

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Postdoctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Postdoctoral Fellow position at BITS Pilani is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the PDF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD degree (or have submitted their thesis) in Mechanical Engineering or related fields with a strong publication record in specified areas.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Postdoctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 70,000 to Rs. 80,000 per month, plus a research consumables allowance.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the email is sent before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Postdoctoral Fellow (PDF) position announced by BITS Pilani.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Postdoctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial application review followed by a merit-based selection.

faq.question: Q8. What are the key areas of research experience preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Strong publication records in Refrigeration, Thermal Engineering, Energy Systems, Heat Pumps, Sustainable Cooling Technologies, CFD, Modelling and Simulation are preferred.

faq.question: Q9. Where is BITS Pilani located?
faq.answer: BITS Pilani is located in Pilani, Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply if my thesis is submitted but the degree is not yet awarded?
faq.answer: Yes, the eligibility criteria state that candidates with a PhD degree or whose thesis has been submitted are eligible to apply.
